meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Scrambled Eggs with Avocado and Toast
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Whisk eggs and pour into the pan, stirring continuously until cooked.
Toast bread and slice avocado.
Serve eggs with avocado and toast.

swap_options.recipe_title: Egg White Omelette with Spinach and Toast
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add spinach and cook until wilted.
Pour egg whites into the pan and cook until set.
Serve with toast.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Grilled Chicken Thighs with Rice and Broccoli
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Season chicken thighs and grill for 6-7 minutes on each side until cooked.
Cook rice as per package instructions.
Steam broccoli until tender.
Serve chicken with rice and broccoli.

swap_options.recipe_title: Baked Salmon with Quinoa and Green Beans
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Place salmon on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, and bake for 12-15 minutes.
Cook quinoa as per package instructions.
Steam green beans until tender.
Serve salmon with quinoa and green beans.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Ground Turkey Stir-fry with Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add ground turkey and cook until browned.
Add diced sweet potatoes and bell peppers, cook until tender.
Serve hot.

swap_options.recipe_title: Beef and Vegetable Stir-fry with Quinoa
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned.
Add mixed vegetables and cook until tender.
Serve with quinoa.

meals.name: Snack
meals.recipe_title: Tuna Salad with Chickpeas
instructions: Drain tuna and chickpeas.
Mix tuna, chickpeas, olive oil, and lemon juice in a bowl.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

swap_options.recipe_title: Egg and Black Bean Salad
instructions: Boil eggs and chop them.
Mix eggs, black beans, olive oil, and lemon juice in a bowl.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Egg White Omelette with Spinach and Toast
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.

instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Season chicken breast and grill for 6-7 minutes on each side until cooked.
Cook quinoa as per package instructions.

Serve chicken with quinoa and asparagus.

swap_options.recipe_title: Baked Cod with Rice and Green Beans
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Place cod on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, and bake for 12-15 minutes.
Cook rice as per package instructions.
Steam green beans until tender.
Serve cod with rice and green beans.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Beef Stir-fry with Bell Peppers and Rice
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned.
Add sliced bell peppers and cook until tender.
Serve with rice.

swap_options.recipe_title: Chicken and Vegetable Stir-fry with Noodles
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chicken thigh and cook until browned.
Add mixed vegetables and cook until tender.
Serve with cooked pasta.

meals.name: Snack
meals.recipe_title: Shrimp and Avocado Salad
instructions: Boil shrimp until cooked and pink.
Slice avocado and mix with shrimp.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

swap_options.recipe_title: Tuna and Chickpea Salad
instructions: Drain tuna and chickpeas.
